prompt: Create an ultra-detailed cinematic vertical photograph of a young woman seated calmly at the center of a gigantic black digital void, using a photorealistic editorial style. She sits on a white modern office chair with chrome arms, a circular chrome base, and small caster wheels, floating above a glossy black mirror floor that clearly reflects her legs, sandals, chair, and the surrounding screens. She has long wavy dark brown hair and wears a dark oversized button-up shirt, loose cream-white trousers, and white slide sandals; her pose is relaxed and composed, one leg crossed over the other, one hand resting on the chair arm and the other on her knee. A dramatic vertical spotlight shines down from above, illuminating her and fading into the surrounding darkness, with shallow depth of field and a moody teal-black color grade. Surround her with thousands of suspended social media interface fragments, thumbnails, profile cards, comment boxes, video tiles, notification icons, red heart-like counters, and tiny glowing UI particles arranged like towering walls receding into deep perspective. Include exactly 4 large readable typography statements embedded on the digital walls: "Consumed By Content" on the left, "Infinite Scroll" on the upper right, "Create or Disappear" on the mid-right, and "404 File Not Found" on the lower right. Include exactly 2 large foreground smartphone screens leaning into the scene: one at bottom left showing a social-media profile/video of the same seated woman, and one at bottom right showing a creator post interface with thumbnails and comments. Add numerous smaller floating panels with miniature portraits of the same woman, analytics snippets, post cards, like counters such as 9.2K, 99+, 459, and 3.0M, and red notification badges, but keep them secondary to the central seated subject. The overall feeling should be surreal, overwhelming, and cinematic, representing being consumed by endless social media content. Use a 2:3 vertical composition, high contrast, glossy reflections, volumetric light, realistic fabric folds, realistic skin and hair detail, and no borders or watermarks.
